_note: id -> AudioGen prompt (English) + duration (sec). priority=true входит в минимальный набор для прототипа. Файлы пишутся в prototype-web/assets/audio/<id>.wav (16kHz mono).

sfx.prompt: two wooden dice rolling and tumbling across a wooden table, single short roll then settling
footsteps walking on gravel and dirt, a few firm steps
drawing a single card from a deck, quick paper card swipe
flipping a thick cardboard card over, quick card flip snap
sliding a card into a stack, soft paper shuffle
slapping a single card down flat onto a wooden table
sharp quick card flip reveal snap
sliding and handing over a paper card, light shuffle
tossing a card onto a discard pile, soft paper flick

sudden magical snap of a trap triggering, sharp dark burst

monstrous bear roaring as it appears, deep aggressive growl
wild beast snarl and a biting snapping attack
dull heavy blow landing on a large beast, deep thud

blacksmith anvil hammering metal, bright crafting success ding

scraping and treating a rough animal leather hide
